counters.description: every part of their kit cooks you, their ult makes you a non-champion, also big invaders are generally good picks into viego. ban this nightmare if you're not in lower elos.
strong invader with great sustain and mobility, throw in a massive knockup and free resets to the kit just to be a pain.
tree man make people not die. people not die make viego want die.
high threat invades, jaw dropping burst, death sentence cc, and tricky to finish off and get resets.
extremely hard to catch and super bursty invader (you may be noticing a pattern).
1700 peak lp shaco otp killed me on my red before i finished typing this.
in and out fighting patterns completely thrown out the window if you're anywhere near this man, his e makes it nearly impossible to finish him off in time for you to pop off with the reset.

probably the hardest adc to deal with as viego, eyewatering mobility while being able to shot put their support you were about to get a reset on at you and smoke you on the turn provided it's <30 into the game.
likely the most dangerous support for a viego to play against, has amazing ally peel and is an insane reengager.
devastating midlaner for a viego when she turns up, extremely hard to catch unless they make a huge mistake with ult down. absolutely blows you up like few other champs at all stages of the game
definitely the nastiest toplaner for viego to be against. backline protection wizard, isolates you and blows you up if he positions well, mobile and sustainable enough to dodge/withstand your ult.

synergies.description: really any high burst mage is at least a decent pair to you, syndra has amazing gank setup and hilarious single target damage.
infinite cc and tankyness while still having solid single target damage, walking reset generator.
perfect champion played by perfect people, fantastic peel and reengage, braum is your best friend.
same reasons as syndra.
same bursty single target damage benefits that make syndra and aurora great with the added bonus of being a skirmish favored meatball you can stand behind.
great skirmisher to have at any objective, but be careful about stacking too much ad in your comp, you may need to build a bit awkwardly if the enemy team takes advantage.
good ally peel and frontlining, but not quite as good as braum at reengage and/or larger fights.
single target burst mages are always welcome but lack in setting you up like syndra and aurora do.
lacks the ability to set you up but if you both participate in that first kill you'll run over the fight.

would say she's a bit better than akali or kat due to having that lil bit more c.c. to enable you. not quite on the level of syndra aurora imo but regardless single target burst mage with resets alongside viego go boom.
mel brings enough of cc and survivability to stack her passive consistently for executes, very good at securing first reset.

extremely high value synergy, the best gank setup you're gonna get while having game winning teamfight abilities that put you in a perfect position to pull the trigger and run over the fight, easily plucking through the cc'ed enemy team for resets
similar to braum, amazing peel and reengage. added bonuses of being a spectacular turret diver and straight up ignoring mobility.

possibly the best disruptor in the game when piloted well, sheer chaos causer and devastating engage. said engage however, may leave your backline exposed for dives if he is the only tanky champ on the team.
good peel and reengager, however lacks the tankyness to be regarded like maokai and braum. that said, a good bailout can be game changing.

great peel, very easy to work with picks on. massive teamfighting ult when used correctly and good at assisting cleanup. lacks tools for reengage if he needs to ally peel first (for fights outside of lane that is).

probably the highest value and instant ally peel in the game (one shotting whoever even thought about going in). he lacks any tools to enable a cleanup, paired with an engage support however k'sante quickly becomes your best friend in the toplane.
really any high burst mage is at least a decent pair to you, syndra has amazing gank setup and hilarious single target damage.
